display:
/qplan follwing @docs/prd.md give me a plan to create order view page. This page should display all details related to a order and offer few actions as follwos

1. Edit order: opens a page similler to /order/new with pre-loaded data. 
2. Delete Order: This action should be gated with a confirmation dialog
3. Print Order: clicking this button should generate a PDF with order detials and trigger native print dialog

using @docs/design.md and ui-ux-pro-max skill give me a plan to implement this.
